title: zapoteca tetragona
intro: Zapoteca tetragona, also known as the Mexican copal or copal tree, is a deciduous tree native to Mexico. The bark and roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Zapoteca tetragona include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, providing health benefits such as relief from colds, flu, and other infections. In herbal preparations, the bark and roots can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
